## GPT models

### Capabilities

| Model ID                 | Description                                                                                                                 | Context Window | Max Output Tokens |
| ------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------- | ----------------- |
| `gpt-multi` (2026-01-01) | Chat Completions API. Responses API. Text and image input. Text output. Structured outputs. Functions and tools. Streaming. | 128,000        | 16,384            |
| `gpt-family`             | Chat Completions API. Text input. Text output.                                                                              | 64,000         | 8,192             |
